theme_notes: Touchstones: the 2026 FIFA World Cup (48 teams, Messi hat trick vs Algeria, USA/Canada/Mexico hosting), US-Iran nuclear talks with JD Vance flying to Switzerland and the Strait of Hormuz closure, the G7 Summit in Evian-les-Bains, and Dua Lipa's widely-covered Italian wedding.
settled: Balanced. Just like US-Iran relations. Don't breathe on it.
You're squared up. The G7 couldn't manage this in three days of meetings.
Clean slate. Rarer than a Messi miss.
youOwe: Less than a World Cup hot dog in New Jersey. Somehow still embarrassing.
Dua Lipa's wedding cost $4 million. You owe fourteen dollars.
Less than a G7 croissant in Evian. Still a debt. Still yours.
Enough to fund one Swiss hotel minibar for doomed nuclear diplomacy.
Mbappé earns this while blinking. You've been blinking for weeks.
The 2026 World Cup has 48 teams. You have zero excuses.
Messi hat-tricked Algeria. You can't Venmo three hundred.
Iran reopened the Strait of Hormuz. Your wallet is still closed.
That's a G7 dinner wine. You didn't earn a seat at the table.
JD Vance flew to Geneva for less awkward negotiations.
The Strait of Hormuz shut down global shipping. You shut down your payment app.
World Cup roundtrip money. You went nowhere near paying this.
Messi's hat-trick ball costs less. He at least delivered.
G7 leaders spent this in Evian on sparkling water. You spent it on regret.
That's a World Cup hospitality package. Champagne not included for you.
Iran closed the Strait of Hormuz. Your partner closed the shared account.
You owe more than a knockout-round VIP suite at the World Cup. No champagne.
JD Vance brokered a nuclear deal. You can't broker a payment plan.
theyOwe: They owe you less than a World Cup souvenir magnet. Demand it anyway.
Smaller than Dua Lipa's wedding olive. Still owed.
Micro-debt. Like a Strait of Hormuz closure, but for your patience.
Mbappé earns this per breath. You've been patient long enough.
That's a G7 gift-shop tote. Collect with dignity.
The Swiss talks are moving faster than their Venmo.
Messi scored three in one game. They can't score one payment.
This is a World Cup matchday jersey. They're wearing yours.
Dua Lipa got married in Italy and sent photos. Your money sent nothing.
JD Vance flew to Switzerland twice for smaller stakes.
The Strait of Hormuz reopened. Their conscience hasn't.
That's a knockout-round World Cup ticket. The match is live. You're uncompensated.
You've become their G7. All the giving, none of the summits.
They owe you a World Cup co-hosting fee. They didn't set up a single chair.
Messi's match-worn shirt costs less at auction. He scored goals too.
The Strait of Hormuz closure cost less goodwill than this has.
Dua Lipa's wedding dress cost less. She got a husband too.
You funded them like America funded the World Cup. No gratitude, no trophy.
